====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''====
[[File:Volkner Journeys.png|thumb|250px|Volkner in ''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]'']]
Volkner's silhouette was seen at the end of ''[[JN065|Thrash of the Titans!]]'', where it was revealed he had entered the [[World Coronation Series]].

In ''[[JN076|All Out, All of the Time!]]'', it was revealed that Ash's next battle in the World Coronation Series was to be against Volkner, who was currently ranked 27th in the competition.

Volkner reappeared in ''[[JN077|Ultra Exciting from the Shocking Start!]]'', where he had his World Coronation Series battle against Ash at the Sunyshore Gym. After a tough battle, Ash was able to defeat Volkner again and climb higher in the Ultra Class. Volkner predicted that Ash would become "the eye of the storm" in not only the Ultra Class, but even in the Master Class, where {{an|Cynthia}} was ranked.

In ''[[JN117|The Fiery Road to Mastership!]]'', Volkner appeared watching the [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match between Cynthia and {{an|Iris}} alongside Flint on a [[Rotom Phone]].
